game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **달의 전설 (Legend of the Moon):** Players navigate classic-style dungeons using a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for movement, while virtual buttons on the right allow for a basic attack and up to four active skills, each with a cooldown (e.g., 5-15 seconds). Dungeons consist of interconnected rooms populated by various monster types, each with unique attack patterns and health pools ranging from 50 to 500 HP, which players must defeat in real-time combat. Upon defeating enemies or opening chests, players acquire gold and randomized equipment (e.g., swords, shields, armor) that provide stat bonuses to Attack, Defense, and Health Points, directly enhancing their character's combat prowess. Progression involves completing narrative-driven quests, unlocking new dungeon tiers (e.g., 5 distinct dungeon zones, each with 10-20 floors), and defeating powerful boss monsters that appear at the end of each zone. Difficulty scales by introducing new enemy types with higher damage output and more complex abilities, increasing enemy density per room, and presenting environmental hazards, requiring players to strategically upgrade gear and utilize skills effectively to avoid their character's HP reaching zero. The core loop involves exploring, engaging in combat, collecting loot, and upgrading equipment to overcome challenges and advance the overarching story towards its conclusion.
game_info.description: Navigate through dangerous dungeons filled with monsters in this action RPG. Defeat enemies to collect gold and powerful equipment that enhances your stats. Progress through increasingly difficult rooms, manage your skills and cooldowns, and survive to reach the final boss. Your goal is to clear all rooms in the dungeon and defeat the boss without letting your HP reach zero.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Basic attack (melee range)
Z: Use Skill 1 - Fireball (ranged attack, 5s cooldown)
Shift: Use Skill 2 - Heal (restore HP, 10s cooldown)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat mechanics test. Validates that the player can move in all directions, attack enemies, and survive basic encounters. Tests collision detection and combat feedback.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move around the starting room exploring all directions. Engage nearby enemies with basic attacks while maintaining distance. Use movement to dodge enemy attacks and collect any dropped items.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves in all cardinal directions, attacks connect with enemies dealing damage, player takes damage when hit, and items can be collected. Position and health values update correctly in game state.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test implementing optimal strategy. Tests full game progression from start to boss defeat. Validates skill usage, equipment collection, room transitions, and boss mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Clear each room systematically by kiting enemies and using ranged Fireball skill. Collect all equipment drops to maximize stats. Use Heal skill strategically to maintain high HP. Navigate to boss room and defeat the boss using hit-and-run tactics while managing cooldowns.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player clears all rooms without dying, equipment enhances player stats visibly, skills activate on cooldown correctly, boss spawns after clearing rooms, and GAME_OVER_WIN state is achieved upon boss defeat.
TEST_2.description: Win condition test implementing optimal strategy. Tests full game progression from start to boss defeat. Validates skill usage, equipment collection, room transitions, and boss mechanics.

TEST_2.expected: Player clears all rooms without dying, equipment enhances player stats visibly, skills activate on cooldown correctly, boss spawns after clearing rooms, and GAME_OVER_WIN state is achieved upon boss defeat.

TEST_3.test_description: Skill system and cooldown management test. Validates that all skills function correctly, cooldowns prevent spam, and skill effects apply properly to both player and enemies.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Alternate between using Fireball and Heal skills while in combat. Attempt to use skills during cooldown periods. Observe visual feedback and actual effects on HP and enemy damage.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Skills only activate when off cooldown. Fireball damages enemies at range. Heal restores player HP up to maximum. Cooldown timers display correctly and prevent premature reuse.
